title: astragalus tenellus var. clementis
intro: Astragalus tenellus var. clementis, also known as a type of legume, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family, specifically belonging to the Astragalus genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in traditional medicine. The health benefits associated with Astragalus tenellus var. clementis include immune system support, reduced stress, and improved cardiovascular health. Astragalus tenellus var. clementis is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or dried extract for its herbal properties to be utilized.
